image:image.image:title: H-Guardian Professional Face Mask Manufacturing Facility
image:image.image:caption: State-of-the-art 100,000-class clean room manufacturing facility with daily output of 1.5 million masks

image:image.image:title: H-Guardian Company Logo
image:image.image:caption: Official logo of H-Guardian - Nanjing Freeman Health Technology Co., Ltd

image:image.image:title: CE FDA Certified Disposable Surgical Mask for Adults
image:image.image:caption: 3-ply surgical mask with 99% BFE efficiency for adult use

image:image.image:title: Adult Surgical Mask Side View
image:image.image:caption: Detailed view showing 3-layer non-woven fabric construction

image:image.image:title: Adult Mask Packaging
image:image.image:caption: Bulk packaging options for wholesale orders

image:image.image:title: Disposable Surgical Mask for Teenagers Ages 13-17
image:image.image:caption: Comfortable fit surgical mask designed specifically for teenagers

image:image.image:title: Teen Mask Size Comparison
image:image.image:caption: Size comparison showing teen mask dimensions (14.5cm x 9.0cm)

image:image.image:title: Colorful Disposable Surgical Masks for Kids
image:image.image:caption: Safe and comfortable masks with soft ear loops for children ages 3-12

image:image.image:title: Kids Mask Colorful Designs
image:image.image:caption: Multiple color options including blue, pink, green, and yellow

image:image.image:title: Double Nose-Clip Mask for Glasses Wearers
image:image.image:caption: Innovative dual nose bridge design provides enhanced seal for glasses wearers

image:image.image:title: Double Nose Clip Detail
image:image.image:caption: Close-up view of dual aluminum nose clips for superior fit

image:image.image:title: H-Guardian Factory Building
image:image.image:caption: Modern manufacturing facility located in Xiantao, Hubei

image:image.image:title: Automated Production Lines
image:image.image:caption: 15 fully automated mask production lines with quality control systems

image:image.image:title: 100,000-Class Clean Room
image:image.image:caption: ISO 14644-1 Class 8 clean room environment for sterile production

image:image.image:title: Quality Control Laboratory
image:image.image:caption: In-house testing facility for BFE, PFE, and VFE efficiency verification

image:image.image:title: CE Certification Mark
image:image.image:caption: CE marking certifying compliance with EU Medical Device Regulation 2017/745

image:image.image:title: FDA Registration Certificate
image:image.image:caption: US FDA registration (Establishment Registration Number: 3018283399)

image:image.image:title: SGS Testing Certification
image:image.image:caption: SGS tested and certified for filtration efficiency

image:image.image:title: ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 13485:2016 Certifications
image:image.image:caption: Quality management system certifications for medical device manufacturing

image:image.image:title: OEM/ODM Customization Services
image:image.image:caption: Custom mask manufacturing with your branding and specifications

image:image.image:title: Custom Packaging Design
image:image.image:caption: Personalized packaging solutions for retail and wholesale
